content:
If you want to build an Ultra / Aequor team with the twins, the best thing in my opinion right now, especially if you're not stressed with endgame team limitations, would be: 
- Castor - Pollux - GMurphy - Blank (Winkle, Corpo, Jenkins, Cassiah, Horla, Clem)
Having GMurphys ultimate up allows Castor and GMurphy to proc sacrifice - corrosion - sacrifice - corrosion, until you're out of cards, or most likely until the enemy is dead. 
Pollux would be there for neutral turns, but mostly just to look pretty.

You can keep pulling blue standard until you get Caecus E3 **if you want**, but you can just as well use a Pyramid on Goliath to get your E3 Caecus off of that. It mostly depends on what else you want from there, since you have a small chance to get Miryam, Murphy and Tulu.
For WoDs, the best standard WoD to +12 is Blade of the Titan/ Titan's Blade. After that Incalculable Factor. After that it depends on what you need.

Castor E3 definetely has priority over Pollux E3 imo. Pollux works well enough E0, while Castor becomes a great dps on top of a shielder with E3. 
Gmurphy E3 is also amazing, as it allows your strike and defend to draw her pot of greed, but she's honestly great no matter the Enlightenment. She just gets even better with each one.

Another thing to note is, that it's a great idea to get at least 1 copy of Castor's and GMurphy's WoD, as they increase your hand size besides having other great effects.
